project_identity.name: Deux pas un monde
project_identity.description: A premium, visual-first travel diary based on Instagram aesthetics. Discover hidden gems, hotels, and restaurants through an interactive map.

usage.background: Use #1A1A1A for the main app background to create depth.
usage.card_bg: Use #2D2D2D for cards and panels. This is the 'Anthracite' requested but used structurally.
usage.text: Use #E8E0D5 (Cream) for all primary headings and body text. This is the signature brand color.
usage.cta: Use #C66B3D (Terracotta) for 'Book Now', 'View Details', or Map Markers. It adds warmth to the cold stone palette.
usage.map_style: Dark mode map. Land: #1A1A1A, Roads: #333333, Water: #141414.

headings.usage: Use for H1, H2, H3. Captures the 'Editorial' and 'Romance' of travel.

body.usage: Use for UI elements, descriptions, buttons.

mobile.structure: Map-first. The map takes up the full screen background. A 'Bottom Sheet' (swipeable drawer) sits on top containing the list of places. The sheet can be minimized to show only the map.
mobile.navigation: Bottom Navigation Bar (Home, Categories, Saved, Admin).

desktop.structure: Split Screen. Left Panel (40% width) for scrollable list of places/details. Right Panel (60% width) for the interactive map.
desktop.container: Full width fluid layout. No centered 'container' for the main view.

PlaceCard.structure: Full-width image aspect-video. Title and Rating below. Dark background (#2D2D2D).
PlaceCard.interaction: Hover: distinct lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow glow.

MapMarker.style: Custom SVG markers. Circle with icon inside. Color coded by category.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use lightly on the Bottom Nav and Top Bar: backdrop-blur-md bg-[#1A1A1A]/80 border-b border-[#ffffff]/5.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text #E8E0D5 on #2D2D2D meets AA standards (Ratio ~6:1).

libraries.map: react-map-gl or leaflet with a custom dark tile layer (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter).
libraries.animations: Framer Motion for page transitions and card hover states.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind Colors: Extend the theme with the custom palette provided above.
2. Fonts: Add the Google Fonts import to index.html or CSS.
3. Map Integration: Use a dark map tile provider (CartoDB Dark Matter is free and looks great).
4. Layout: Implement the Split View for Desktop and Bottom Sheet for Mobile.
5. Cards: Ensure they have the 'Polaroid' feel - clean, image focused, with the 'Cream' text.
6. Admin: Keep it simple but consistent with the dark theme. Don't revert to a white admin panel.
7. Data Test IDs: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors with texture if possible.
Avoid centered layouts for text, use left-align for readability.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states.
